title: Large Mortar and Pestle Set, 100% Granite, Natural Unpolished, Herb Crusher, Spice Grinder, Stone Grinder Bowl for Making Guacamole and Pesto, 6.3 Inch Pestle and 19.6 oz Mortar(2.4 Cup)
description:
About this item
MULTIFUNCTION: This mortar and pestle set with a generous 580ml capacity and 6.3 inch pestle effectively grinds both wet and dry ingredients. Crush, grind, pound, and pulverize herbs, spices, coffee, and more to release natural flavors and aromas
PERFECT CHRISTMAS GIFTS: Our granite mortar and pestle is a traditional kitchen implement used since ANCIENT times as the best way to crush, grind and powder herbs and dry spices. Granite's nonporous qualities can preserve the aroma of spices to the maximum
STURDY: The inherently durable and heavy granite stone provides stability,keeping it from slipping on your kitchen counters. Made from unpolished granite, our mortar’s interior provides the best and natural friction for crushing, grinding or powdering
QUICK CLEANING: Solid Granite Mortar and Pestle will not absorb oils, spices or juices. Simple to hand wash with water and let dry. Your mortar and pestle set is also easy to clean and won’t leave any dusty residue behind
SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: We use high quality granite, as long as you think there is something wrong with the product, pleasefeel free to contact us. If our set fails to meet your expectations, you are welcome to return it for a hassle-free
reviews_5s:
Very well made and a good size. Heavy durable stone with carefully cut striations on the pestle make for easy grinding of herbs and spices. Whole cloves break down with ease and the heavy weight of the pestle really helps with overall functionality.Exactly what I was looking for! Super nice quality, super sturdy and heavy, great size not just for spices but for larger things too!I am glad I found this product so I can smash herbs & seeds & Make guacamole. Its nice & heavy duty yes compact & manageable. It can fit easily in cabinets but has the capacity to hold more than the average vessel. I would also take the liberty of seasoning this set before any serious use.I love this thing! It's heavy duty and I can really smash and grind ingredients with no worry of breaking it. The best part is that it adds beauty to my kitchen! I keep it on the counter because It just looks elegant!Solidly build and beautifully finished...a quality product at a Very reasonable priceI bought this to replace a smaller stone molcajete that I had because I wanted a larger capacity and different material. I also wanted something less porous and/or a darker color, so that it wouldn’t be discolored by different chilies, spices, etc. Cast iron seemed like a good option, and this has worked well for me so far.

Pros:
-Feels heavy and durable
-Effective for a wide range of ingredients
-Doesn’t stain/discolor over time
-Deep enough to avoid splashes/spills
-No risk of stone “grit” in your food

Cons
-Not dishwasher safe
-Cast iron requires maintenance

I have used this with single ingredients (spices/herbs, dried chilies, etc.) as well as mixtures (ex. garlic, jalapeno, cilantro, tomato, avocado for guacamole). For the latter, it’s nice that you can use another utensil to mix/stir after grinding and not worry about scratches or damage. You can also heat it safely, if you want to smoke or roast your spices.

But it’s important to note that you will need to maintain the cast iron to keep the protective seasoning intact. I clean mine with hot water, dry thoroughly, and then rub with a bit of oil. Occasional heat should also help to maintain the seasoning. Don't soak it or leave it wet after use.

Notes for gifting: It comes snugly packaged in a box that does not directly reveal the contents (just the brand name). The mortar and pestle are wrapped separately inside to prevent damage in shipping. The box is plain cardboard (not laminated, no color/images, etc.) and there are no instructions or documentation inside.I have yet to use it but I love it. I have no reservations about ordering it at all. I love cast iron. It is the perfect size and nice depth. I have no doubts that I will enjoy it for years to come.Buenísimo me encanta su tamaño y pesoawesomeThe item is better then described. Its perfect!!!
reviews_1s:
The product is good, it is heavy and does the job, however it is a damaged piece. It has been chipped off in the rim. Not sure if that happened in-transit or it was a damaged piece right from the beginning.
Expected it to be of a better quality, disappointed that it is not.

Please see attached photos, highlighting the same.I'm really disappointed with the Velaze Granite Mortar and Pestle Set I got. There's a weird spot (circular crack, pitted, matte) on the mortar that looks bad and worries me. I haven't used it yet, and I probably won't because it seems like the spot might come off if I use it. I wonder how it passed quality inspection.Play Video
I am leaving one star until I receive a replacement, the mortar (bowl) is totally missing and the pestle is broken in a bunch of pieces. The pieces of the pestle are good quality just useless in their current state. Edit to this post I did receive a beautiful replacement and I love it and it’s exactly as described!Followed the instructions for seasoning the inside of this mortar & pestle, unfortunately the black paint on the pestle is now silver. I own a collection of mortar & pestles, giving me the experience to seasoning them all properly!
Sorry I didn't listen to all the bad reviews. 😔
~ nI got this to crush spices and make salsas, however everything is coming out black.It rusted juat sitting there. It had spots that looked as though it was paint chipping when it arrived but I was hoping it would surprise me. It has been sitting decoratively and has completely rusted. Worthless.I seasoned/cleaned this mortar and pestle as stated in the directions. I'm thoroughly disappointed that a black finish has rubbed off. I have and use multiple cast iron pans and have never seen a black finish come off! That is alarming. Not sure what I am going to do.The pestle arrived broken in half. The box had been opened previously. It was wrapped in bubbles, but still broken.After the first use, the black coating started coming off and then it started to rust. Do not buy.Salió quebrado
